title: Sea of Bombs
description: Adds the Fire, & Blast Bombs and the Bone Caller from Sea of Thieves
body:
Adds the Fire and Blast Bombs from Sea of Theives to Minecraft

## Blast Bomb
- **Crafting**: 3x Glass , 1x Magma Block
- **Usage**: When Hitting a Mob, Player, or the Ground it will Explode leaving a small Crator and dealing Explosive Damage to Nearby Mobs Aswell

## Fire Bomb
- **Crafting**: 3x Glass , 1x Fire Charge
- **Usage**: When Hitting a Mob, or Player it will Set them on fire, If it hits the ground it will instead light the surrounding blocks on fire
